meta.note: Portfolio + product command center across both repos. Curated fields = the AI audit; git fields = auto-refreshed by scripts/portfolio-sync.py.

repos.name: WokAndKarahiTexas.com
repos.role: The flagship / lab where capabilities are proven

repos.name: AZ Restaurant Partners
repos.role: The product / consulting business where capabilities are packaged and sold

summary.thesis: Not 8 projects — ONE system: a shared restaurant spine (Clover data + guest identity + a sense→approve→act loop) with faucets on top (website, phone, spin-wheel, campaigns). The replicable product = AZ Restaurant Partners. Wok & Karahi itself is being prepared for sale, which makes the replicable platform the durable asset.

projects.name: Website (public site)
projects.role: The storefront the whole system optimizes — discovery → direct orders + catering. AZ offering: 'AEO-ready site' (#2).
projects.stage: Live at wokandkarahitexas.com; SEO/AEO build, entity schema, static menu, occasion pages shipped.
blockers: Real Clover item photos (gated on Clover dev-app verification)
next: Add real photos + 3P prices once Clover dev-app verified
projects.az_offering: AEO-ready website (Ledger #2 — 🟢 live, but thin proof on AZ site)

projects.name: Analytics Dashboard (Control Plane)
projects.role: The owner's decision cockpit — Clover sales/channels/menu/margins + AI chat. Also the SPINE's single Clover READ layer everything should converge onto.
projects.stage: v2 is the flagship (app_v2/engine_v2 + JS sections); v1 still shipped in the image. Deployed to a private HF Space.
blockers: Books/cash side must stay gated (never in the public Space)
manual_steps: HF Space secrets: CLOVER_API_KEY/TOKEN, MERCHANT_ID, GROQ_API_KEY, AUTH_USER/PASS

overlaps.what: clover_sync duplicates engine_v2's tender map + channel classification
voice-agent has its own Clover client

next: Make engine_v2 the ONE Clover reader; others import it

projects.name: Living-Website Engine
projects.role: The SPINE's approve→act loop: sense (sales+weather+events+SEO) → weekly email → owner approves by reply → auto-ships site changes. AZ's strongest recurring-retainer product (#9).
projects.stage: Phases 0–3b built + running (WATCH guard, sensors, weekly email, reply-parse, PR executor with AUTO_MERGE). First real email delivered; WK_ENGINE_* secrets set.

overlaps.what: guest platform's 'campaign brain + owner-approval layer' is ~80% a re-plan of THIS loop

next: Make this the ONE approval kernel — route the guest platform's campaigns + the email senders through it
projects.az_offering: Closed-loop AEO/SEO growth engine (Ledger #9 — 🔵/🔴 'strongest recurring-retainer product', NOT yet marketed)

projects.name: Guest & Loyalty Platform
projects.role: The SPINE's guest system-of-record: phone-keyed profiles, spin-wheel acquisition faucet, Clover order graph + identity resolution, admin/floor portals. Converts 3P customers to direct (~$29K/yr commission drag).
projects.stage: Game + profiles + portals + agent API + Clover graph code-complete & offline-tested (27+11 tests). Campaign brain is spec-only. 0% deployed.
blockers: Nothing deployed — merge branch triggers Render+Pages
Needs a persistent disk or the member DB wipes on deploy
manual_steps: Merge branch, run first sync, print spin-card QR

overlaps.what: DON'T build a 2nd approval/campaign loop — emit findings into seo_engine
clover_sync copy-pastes engine_v2's tender map — converge
voice-agent's loyalty.json/caller_history duplicate this member store (consent hazard)

projects.az_offering: Unified customer identity (CDP) + receipt-scan 3P→direct (Ledger #17 — 🔵 in active build)

projects.name: AI Voice Agent (phone)
projects.role: The phone faucet — answers every call (EN + Urdu/Hindi), takes orders straight into Clover, catering, upsell, warm-transfer, reads the guest graph. AZ offering: AI phone answering (#1).
projects.stage: Real-write-capable, 28 Vapi tools, tested offline. 0% live (no phone number, not deployed). README stale ('build not started' is wrong).
manual_steps: Provision Vapi phone number + overflow forwarding

overlaps.what: loyalty.json + caller_history duplicate the member/consent store — TCPA hazard
own Clover client duplicates engine_v2 (write side is legit; read/constants aren't)

next: Deploy + phone number + live cutover test
projects.az_offering: AI phone agent (Ledger #1 — 🟢 live at flagship per AZ; needs a public demo link)

projects.name: Business Exit Prep (private)
projects.role: CONFIDENTIAL — toolkit to sell Wok & Karahi (target close Aug 31), asset-led. Reframes the mission: the replicable platform is the durable asset. (Financials/PII kept OUT of this dashboard.)
projects.stage: Research corpus + buyer data-room + outreach CRM ~90% done; owner-side assembly + landlord/attorney steps remain. Stranded on branch (never publish).

overlaps.what: shares Clover/books data as an INPUT only — no duplicated tooling

next: Keep private — never a public deploy path
projects.az_offering: n/a — but validates that AZ (the product) is the asset that outlives one location

projects.name: Instagram Content System
projects.role: Organic brand engine — the 'Duality' mirror-format art system + a generalized content-robot. Adjacent to seo_engine's content executor.
projects.stage: Strategy + art system ~90%; execution ~5% (nothing rendered/posted). 80 commits behind main — stale.
manual_steps: Stand up n8n/WhatsApp/IG API for automation

overlaps.what: could feed the same brand/GBP content pipeline eventually

next: Harvest strategy + free-stack scripts, rebase onto main

projects.name: Staffing & Hiring Plan
projects.role: Ops playbook — steady-state staffing table + hiring sourcing + outreach templates. (Branch is misnamed; the pricing work already shipped to main.)
projects.stage: Finished document. No code. Trivial additive merge.

projects.name: Ops Micro-apps
projects.role: Standing utilities — daily sales-report email, weekly promo email, guest chat, employee portal, recipe/catering tool. Some duplicate the spine's Clover client + email senders.
projects.stage: Live via Render + GitHub Actions crons.

overlaps.what: email senders should route through the one approval kernel

next: Fold email senders under the one approval kernel over time
projects.az_offering: Chat POS assistant (#10), staff handbook (#11) — proven, unmarketed

projects.name: AZ Product & Website
projects.role: THE PRODUCT — packages every flagship capability as named, priced offerings. This is the replicable, sellable asset. Site live at azrestaurantpartners.com.
projects.stage: Site + published pricing + 101-tool toolbox + 12 guides live. Capability ledger + onboarding playbook mature. Pre-first-external-client.
blockers: Case study live but 3 hard-outcome numbers pending (owner)
manual_steps: Fill case-study numbers (direct-vs-3P shift, $ commission recovered, calls captured)

overlaps.what: AZ should market this as its flagship recurring offer (#9)

next: Roll AEO engine offer into outreach

duplications.converge_to: analytics/engine_v2 (one reader) + one small write module

duplications.why: 3 inboxes asking approval for one restaurant

duplications.converge_to: rewards/ as system of record; voice-agent reads via rewards_client
duplications.why: TCPA/consent hazard — opted-in one store, out the other

duplications.converge_to: analytics v2 (+ guest-360 as a section)

sequence: Unify the Clover layer (engine_v2 = the one reader; kill duplicate tender maps)
One approval kernel (route guest-platform campaigns + email senders through seo_engine)
One guest graph (fold voice-agent loyalty/caller_history into rewards/)
Ship the two near-done faucets (deploy guest platform + voice agent)
Cheap cleanups (merge staffing doc; harvest Instagram; archive stale branches)
Productize (update AZ ledger to reality; publish W&K case study; package the AEO engine as the flagship offer)
convergence.runbook: Execution runbooks now on Wok main: docs/CONVERGENCE-PLAN.md (the 3 refactors, file-level) + docs/BRANCH-DISPOSITIONS.md.
